design_philosophy: Functional beauty with optical clarity. Treat the UI like a high-end Swiss poster mixed with a digital command center. Use strict grids, minimal decoration, and rely entirely on typography, 1px lines, and negative space to define structure.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense text and data. Center-align empty states and primary drag-and-drop zones.

surface_styles.cards: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-none shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform duration-200
surface_styles.upload_zone: bg-gray-50 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 hover:border-[#002FA7] hover:bg-blue-50/50 transition-colors duration-200 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12
surface_styles.sidebar: bg-[#F9F9FA] border-r border-gray-200 h-screen sticky top-0
surface_styles.header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-50

components_strategy.buttons: Square or slightly rounded (rounded-sm) buttons. High contrast. Primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white. Secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#0A0A0A].
components_strategy.tables: Shadcn Table with customized minimal borders. Row borders only (border-b), no vertical cell borders.
components_strategy.badges: Square badges, no rounded pills. Solid background with contrasting text.
components_strategy.forms: Inputs with 1px border-gray-300, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:border-[#002FA7]. No heavy shadows.

animations.hover_states: Fast and crisp. 150ms ease-out on colors, 200ms ease-out on transforms.
animations.page_transitions: Fade in and slight slide up (10px) on load for grid items to stagger in.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, structural and crisp. No filled icons unless for active states.

images.description: User profile picture for account settings / header avatar
Secondary user profile picture for team members / shared docs

accessibility.contrast: Maintain APCA/WCAG AA minimums. Ensure placeholder text in inputs meets 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility.focus_states: All focusable elements MUST have ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-[#002FA7].
accessibility.testing: Include data-testid on all interactive elements using kebab-case role-based names.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Use pure HTML and Tailwind CSS structure inside React components. Map the provided JSON colors directly into tailwind config.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: For the drag-and-drop UI, ensure the hit area is massive (min-h-[300px]) with dashed borders.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: For the document viewer, implement a split-pane layout: Document preview on the left (col-span-8), OCR/Details on the right (col-span-4).
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Make sure the sidebar is slim and collapsible on desktop, and hidden behind a hamburger menu on mobile.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Do not use Inter for headings. Ensure `Cabinet Grotesk` is imported and used for h1, h2, h3.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Use the provided image URLs strictly for avatars. For document thumbnails, generate CSS-based abstract representations (e.g., light gray rectangle with dark gray lines acting as text lines).
